title: MundoMagis: Reborn
description: Magic mod for Minecraft with magic wand, spells
body:
If you are a big fan of Harry Potter, this mod is made for you. Start with easiest spell and end with the greatest spell



Mod adds:

Magic Wand

Regenio Spellbook

Teleportio Spellbook



This your wands you can become the strongest wizard and fight with other players



Can you get all spells? Start this challenge now this Mundo Magis!
